chapter_title.en: Chapter 165 – The entering the (chambers of) women

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/360)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/360)
text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ دَاخِلٌ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ أَوْلِيَائِهِنَّ .

en.hubeali: ‘(He<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The entering one should not enter the (chambers of) women except with the permission of their guardians’.
en.sarwar: 2. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: “Men must not enter the place of women without the permission of their guardian.” H 10086, Ch. 168, h 3
